# Dorian Guzman

> AI systems developer specializing in agentic systems, quantitative research, and optimization. HSG MBA and PhD in Optimization with experience in iGaming, DeFi, and energy sectors.

## Profile

- [Homepage](https://dorianguzman.github.io/): Professional CV and portfolio showcasing AI systems development expertise, quantitative research background, and business strategy experience. Includes detailed work history, education credentials, and technical skills.

## Expertise

- [Skills & Impact](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#skills): Covers four core areas - Strategic AI Implementation, Quantitative Research & Optimization, Agentic Systems Architecture, and Business Strategy & Execution. Details technical stack including Python, Node.js, Go, FastAPI, AWS, GCP, and relevant AI/ML frameworks.
- [AI & Agentic Systems](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#skills): Specialization in LLMs, multi-agent architecture, RAG, fine-tuning, model optimization, and production ML infrastructure.
- [Quantitative & Optimization](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#skills): Mathematical optimization, operations research, statistical modeling, risk management, and algorithmic design expertise.

## Experience

- [NXT Partners](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#experience): Co-founder building agentic AI systems for brand visibility in iGaming. Co-developed ClippingDistrict automated content distribution platform and established partnership with Latam Entertainment Group.
- [Deep Q Digital](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#experience): Quantitative Systems Engineer role building P&L tracking systems for DeFi operations, backtesting infrastructure for trading strategies, and live trading systems in crypto markets.
- [Energy Projects](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#experience): Head of Data Science developing genetic algorithm optimization for solar energy systems, digital twin models for photovoltaic systems with 6% power forecasting accuracy, and published peer-reviewed research.

## Education

- [MBA - University of St. Gallen](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#education): International management, leadership, and corporate finance with thesis on Risk Management for DeFi Liquidity Provisioning. Strategic foundations for AI transformation and emerging markets.
- [PhD in Optimization](https://dorianguzman.github.io/#education): Specialized in genetic algorithms and mathematical optimization for complex systems. Published research on digital twinning and PV power forecasting. Featured in "Rising Stars in Energy Research: 2022".

## Key Facts

- Education: MBA from University of St. Gallen (HSG), PhD in Optimization (Energy Systems & Operations Research)
- Co-founder at NXT Partners (AI systems for iGaming)
- Former Quantitative Systems Engineer at Deep Q Digital (DeFi/crypto)
- Former Head of Data Science at Energy Projects (solar optimization)
- Technical expertise: Python, Node.js, Go, FastAPI, AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker
- Research areas: Agentic AI, multi-agent systems, quantitative research, mathematical optimization, DeFi, genetic algorithms
- Published researcher in energy systems optimization
- Featured in "Rising Stars in Energy Research: 2022"
